groupings.name: Slow Dance in Your Room
groupings.description: Soft, giddy love songs for swaying with someone you adore.

groupings.name: Hazy Summer Evenings
groupings.description: Dreamy and languid, floating through warm nights with someone close.

groupings.name: I Think I Love You
groupings.description: Big, earnest declarations of falling hard and meaning it.

groupings.name: Quiet Devotion
groupings.description: Tender and aching, for the love that stays without saying much.

groupings.name: Wide Open Longing
groupings.description: Songs that feel like running toward something vast and uncertain.
